result:
I don’t “want” anything from you—I don’t have needs or intentions. I’m here because you opened this chat, and my role is to respond to whatever you choose to say or ask.

If you want a direct boundary: you don’t owe me anything, and you can end the conversation at any time.

If you tell me what you’re aiming for (or what you don’t want), I can match that—e.g., minimal replies, no questions back, or just silence unless prompted.

content.text:

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
